---
title: "revealjs"
mainfont: Roboto
format:
  fnl-revealjs:
    logo: /_extensions/fnl/fnl-logo-light.png
    embed-resources: true
---

## Example slide

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CCBR/reproducible-toolchain/36b3bc690081bbf9c1a87f7cff86ffe250d8b73e/img/toolchain-components-labeled.jpg)

:::{.notes}
- use this for presenter notes
:::

## Example two-column layout


:::: {.column width="60%"}
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CCBR/reproducible-toolchain/36b3bc690081bbf9c1a87f7cff86ffe250d8b73e/img/nextflow-template-toolchain.jpg)
::::

:::: {.column width="30%" .align-right}
here's some text to go alongside the image
::::

::: footer
<https://github.com/CCBR/quarto-fnl>
:::

## Help

:::{.align-center}
see the quarto docs for more info 
<https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/>
:::
